## Evidence Review Note

**Task:** T-04-002b-review-sources
**Title:** Review uploaded tenancy agreement and arrears correspondence
**Matter:** napier-accommodation-arrears

### Status
No source materials or artifacts were provided in this work order. The evidence manifest and source_materials sections are both empty. Therefore, no tenancy agreement, arrears correspondence, or other documents could be reviewed.

### Recommendation
A follow-up task has been proposed to locate and upload the required documents. Once the documents are available, this review should be re-run.
